package router

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for router_setup_runs_migrations: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Gin router or handler setup code that also performs migrations.
type CaseRouterSetupRunsMigrationsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRouterSetupRunsMigrationsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRouterSetupRunsMigrationsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRouterSetupRunsMigrationsModel
}

type CaseRouterSetupRunsMigrationsService struct {
    repo *CaseRouterSetupRunsMigrationsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRouterSetupRunsMigrationsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRouterSetupRunsMigrations(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRouterSetupRunsMigrationsDTO) error {

    db.AutoMigrate(&CaseRouterSetupRunsMigrationsModel{})
    log.Println("migrations completed in router setup")
    r := gin.Default()
    r.GET("/health", func(c *gin.Context) { c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "ok"}) })
    _ = r
    return nil
}
